name: Polyamine Treatment in Elderly Patients With Coronary Artery Disease
summary: ClinicalTrials.gov active-not-recruiting 180-participant phase 2 randomized quadruple-masked spermidine trial in elderly patients with coronary artery disease and related cardiometabolic conditions, with physical performance, muscle, inflammation, cognition, autophagy, polyamine, vascular, and cardiovascular endpoints and no posted results in the June 11, 2026 API view.
